query:
UPDATE quickfireChallenges SET status = 'archived', archivedAt = NOW() WHERE status = 'live';
SELECT id, title, status, publishDate, publishedAt, archivedAt, createdAt FROM quickfireChallenges ORDER BY createdAt ASC;
command:
